'''Lucinta Cal-Meg''' was the [[Scientist/Legends|Physics]] [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] and [[Student Adviser]]<ref name="TH" /> at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]] when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Mako Spince]] were [[Cadet/Legends|cadets]] training to become [[Imperial officer/Legends|officers]].<ref name="THG" /> Cal-Meg noted Cadet Solo's innate intelligence and the fact that he had attempted to improve his grades.<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

Cal-Meg was present at Spince's expulsion proceedings after the cadet used [[antimatter]]<ref name="TH" /> stolen from the professor's own physics laboratory to blow up the Academy's [[Mascot Moon]].<ref name="THG" /> Cal-Meg reported on the prognosis of the planetoid fragments, and the lack of stability in the [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] debris.<ref name="TH" />
